title: Evaluation Report
description: Credibility and hype evaluation of an extraction

extraction_report_id.description: ID of the extraction report being evaluated

credibility_score.description: Overall credibility of the source content

credibility_evidence.description: Specific evidence supporting the credibility score

hype_level.description: Level of hype or overclaim detected

hype_evidence.description: Specific phrases or patterns indicating hype

archive_recommendation.description: Whether to produce an archive entry

warnings.description: Caveats to attach to archive entry if archived
